title: The Rooftop Battle Turns Desperate
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Law, Unknown person #11, Kaido, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.
scene: The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This doesn't sound good!! Let's go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Right!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: MADDOW!! GRR!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Castle Interior, Basement

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Nothing but flames everywhere!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Cough! Cough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Is there a way out....?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Look for an exit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm fighting, Trafalfalgar... Surrendering...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: or letting him kill us... are both out of the question.

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: DANN straw hat-ya! Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don't be absurd!! What can I do...

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: against someone Luffy lost to?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You can fight until your last breath!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Isn't that the way of the Samuel?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If not us, then who?! Everyone else is at their limit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even Kaido must be feeling it by now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That would just be throwing away more lives!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It pains me to admit this, but if Luffy's gone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Our only option is to yield!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm not letting that happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll live and then what?! They'll be slaves until the day they finally die from exhaustion!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: In the end, surrendering won't save anyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the Daimyo that allowed Crochi to have his way went to their graves full of regret!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything Wano endured for the past 20 years was for the sake of this battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if surrender is our only option, I'd rather...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...We die together!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
